name: 20 MHz Dual Channel Analog Oscilloscope
tagline: Classic dual-channel CRO with 20 MHz bandwidth — reliable, proven, ideal for electronics labs and service workshops.
description: The Vartech SS-5020B is a 20 MHz dual-channel analog oscilloscope (CRO) designed for electronics labs, service workshops, and educational institutions. It offers 5 mV to 5 V/div vertical sensitivity, stable triggering, and a crisp CRT display. Two 10:1 ratio probes are included as standard. As a straightforward, no-frills analog oscilloscope it is the go-to choice for routine waveform observation, frequency and amplitude measurement, and signal troubleshooting in AC/DC circuits.
features: 20 MHz bandwidth — captures the vast majority of signals encountered in electronics design and service work
Dual channel — observe two signals simultaneously for phase comparison and signal tracing
5 mV to 5 V/div vertical sensitivity — wide dynamic range from small signal to mains-voltage waveforms
Stable analog triggering — automatic, normal and TV triggering modes for a locked display
Compact bench-top design — easy to accommodate on a crowded workbench
Two 10:1 ratio probes included — ready to use out of the box

name: 30 MHz Dual Channel Analog Oscilloscope
tagline: 30 MHz dual-channel CRO — extra bandwidth headroom for audio, RF fundamentals, and faster digital signals.
description: The Vartech SS-5030B is a 30 MHz dual-channel analog oscilloscope with 5 mV to 5 V/div vertical sensitivity. It shares the proven CRT platform of the SS-5020B but with 50% more bandwidth — making it better suited to audio amplifier testing, power electronics, and signals with higher harmonic content. Widely used in electronics labs, engineering colleges, and production test benches. Two 10:1 ratio probes are included as standard.
features: 30 MHz bandwidth — handles audio, RF fundamentals, switching power supplies and most embedded system signals
Dual channel — simultaneous two-signal display for phase and timing analysis
5 mV to 5 V/div vertical sensitivity across all ranges
Automatic, normal and TV triggering — stable lock on any repetitive signal
Compact bench-top form factor — minimal footprint for lab and workshop use
Two 10:1 ratio probes included as standard

name: 30 MHz Dual Channel CRO with Component Tester
tagline: 30 MHz oscilloscope with built-in component tester — check resistors, capacitors, transistors and diodes without a separate instrument.
description: The Vartech SS-5030BC combines a 30 MHz dual-channel analog oscilloscope with a built-in component tester, eliminating the need for a separate component analyser on the workbench. The component tester displays the I-V characteristic of resistors, capacitors, inductors, transistors and diodes directly on the CRT screen — invaluable for in-circuit component checking and fault finding. Two 10:1 ratio probes are included.
features: 30 MHz dual-channel oscilloscope for standard waveform capture and signal analysis
Built-in component tester — displays I-V characteristics of resistors, capacitors, inductors, transistors and diodes on-screen
Component testing without powering the circuit — ideal for safe fault finding in electronic assemblies
5 mV to 5 V/div vertical sensitivity for wide dynamic range measurement
All standard trigger modes — auto, normal, TV
Two 10:1 ratio probes included

specs.label: Component Tester
specs.value: Built-in — I-V characteristic display for R, L, C, transistors, diodes

name: 80 MHz 4-Channel Digital Storage Oscilloscope
tagline: Four independent channels at 80 MHz and 1 GS/s — see the full picture in embedded systems, power electronics and mixed-signal work.
description: The Vartech SS-5080DS4 is an 80 MHz, 4-channel digital storage oscilloscope (DSO) with 1 GS/s real-time sampling, a 7-inch TFT colour display, and USB interface for waveform data export. Four independent channels allow engineers to observe multiple signals simultaneously — essential for I²C/SPI bus analysis, motor drive phase relationships, multi-rail power supply verification, and any application where signal interaction between channels must be seen at once. The 500 µV/div minimum sensitivity captures small-signal and sensor outputs alongside higher-level control signals in the same acquisition.
features: 4 independent channels — observe up to 4 signals simultaneously, ideal for bus protocols and multi-phase systems
80 MHz bandwidth with 1 GS/s real-time sampling rate — captures fast edges in embedded systems and switching converters
500 µV/div to 10 V/div vertical sensitivity — handles signals from sensor outputs to mains-level waveforms
7-inch TFT colour display — crisp, high-contrast waveform display with colour coding per channel
USB interface — save waveforms, screenshots and measurements directly to a USB drive
Advanced math, FFT and cursor measurements — frequency, period, rise time, RMS, peak-to-peak and more
Probes included as standard

specs.label: Trigger Modes
specs.value: Edge, Pulse Width, Video, Slope, Alternate

name: 100 MHz Dual Channel Digital Storage Oscilloscope
tagline: High-performance 100 MHz DSO with 1 GS/s sampling and 7-inch TFT display — USB ready for data export.
description: The Vartech SS-5100DS1B is a 100 MHz dual-channel digital storage oscilloscope with 1 GS/s real-time sampling, a 7-inch TFT colour display, and USB interface. It delivers high-performance waveform capture for power electronics, embedded systems, motor drives, and RF fundamentals. The 2 mV/div minimum sensitivity handles millivolt-level signals from sensors and op-amp outputs. Waveforms, measurements and screenshots can be saved directly to USB storage. Two 10:1 ratio probes are included as standard.
features: 100 MHz bandwidth — captures fast signals in switching power supplies, microcontroller systems and motor drives
1 GS/s real-time sampling — resolves fast edges and narrow pulses with high fidelity
2 mV/div to 10 V/div vertical sensitivity — wide range from small signal to power-level waveforms
7-inch TFT colour display — large, bright, colour-coded dual-channel display
USB interface — save waveforms and screenshots to USB storage
Comprehensive measurements — frequency, period, rise time, fall time, RMS, peak-to-peak, duty cycle
Two 10:1 ratio probes included as standard

specs.label: Trigger Modes
specs.value: Edge, Pulse Width, Video, Slope, Alternate

name: 150 MHz DSO with Built-in 25 MHz Function Generator
tagline: Top-of-range 150 MHz DSO plus an integrated 25 MHz function generator — signal source and analyser in one instrument.
description: The Vartech SS-5150DS1B FG is a 150 MHz dual-channel digital storage oscilloscope with a built-in 25 MHz function generator — two essential lab instruments in one bench-top unit. The 1 GS/s DSO handles the most demanding signal analysis work, while the integrated function generator provides on-demand sine, square, triangle and other waveforms for stimulus-response testing, filter characterisation, amplifier frequency response and circuit verification. A 7-inch TFT colour display, USB interface, and two ratio probes and one BNC cable are included.
features: 150 MHz bandwidth — the highest bandwidth in the Vartech SS DSO range for fast digital and RF fundamentals
1 GS/s real-time sampling — resolves sub-nanosecond edges with accuracy
Built-in 25 MHz function generator — sine, square, triangle and waveform output without a separate instrument
Two independent channels — simultaneous dual-signal capture for stimulus-response and phase analysis
2 mV/div to 10 V/div vertical sensitivity
7-inch TFT colour display with USB for waveform and screenshot export
2 ratio probes and 1 BNC cable included

specs.label: Built-in Function Generator
specs.value: 25 MHz — Sine, Square, Triangle and more

specs.label: Trigger Modes
specs.value: Edge, Pulse Width, Video, Slope, Alternate
